title: MobileFormState
description: Schema-owned values used by installable-app forms when the editable presentation value is derived into one or more backend payload fields rather than written verbatim.

authOtpCode.description: Six-digit SMS verification code entered before Firebase credential exchange.

chatsInboxSearchQuery.description: Local Consumer or Host inbox participant-name filter.

eventDurationMinutes.description: Create/edit event duration. Save adapters derive endTimeMillis from this value and startTimeMillis.

eventCohortCapsEnabled.description: Whether the event form reveals and emits cohort capacity limits.

eventDynamicPricingEnabled.description: Whether the event form reveals and emits demand-pricing rules.

eventSuccessLiveCardIncluded.description: Whether a host includes an optional live event-success card.

eventSuccessModuleSelected.description: Whether a host includes an optional event-success module in the selected module id collection.

eventSuccessQuestionnaireMode.description: Presentation mode that derives questionnaire module selection and pairing configuration.

onboardingDateOfBirthText.description: Read-only date text rendered by the onboarding date picker before it is saved as a timestamp.

suvbotTesterPhoneNumber.description: Phone identifier used by the local Suvbot tester action.
